Thought 6: The evidence strongly points to Max. He had the murder weapon (the sickle) in his collection, a clear motive (Dwayne threatened to expose an inauthentic artifact, which would ruin Max's reputation), and opportunity (he was the last person seen with Dwayne and gave him a ride in the car where the murder occurred). His unease during questioning also suggests guilt. Anthony had a motive (religious/artistic disagreements) and access to the car (via keys), but no direct link to the sickle. The gold paint is unexplained but seems unrelated to the crime. Therefore, Max is the most likely murderer.

Action 6: Finish[1] (Max)
